Monotony

✍️Mar 20, 2026·Mile 40

Blistering Heat, Blistering Feet — Day 3 — Mount Laguna

One of the nice things about starting the PCT in March is that the first stretch of desert is much cooler, usually highs in the 60s and 70s. One of the bad things about starting the PCT this March is
